contract_plan.description: Channel-tiled stream contract that keeps each activation stream within the configured bus cap.

final_result.fix_hint: Layer layer1_0_conv1 does not fit contract 'tiled-streaming': effective_input_width_bits=4096 and output_width_bits=4096 exceeds max_bus_width_bits=256. Reduce channel_tile / beat width or select a heavier contract.
final_result.classifier_reason: The orchestrator capability gate explicitly rejected this module before simulation: effective bus width (4096 bits, from channel_tile=512 × 8-bit channels) exceeds the contract's max_bus_width_bits=256. No RTL code bug — the channel_tile must be reduced (e.g., to 32) or a heavier contract selected.

available_contracts.description: Full packed activation bus, current default contract.
Channel-tiled stream contract that keeps each activation stream within the configured bus cap.
External-memory-backed weights contract for layers that cannot fit the simpler streaming contracts.
